name: get_ticket_details
description: Look up the details of a ticket by its ticket ID using the Box connector. Searches Box for the ticket (by ID appearing in the file name, content, or metadata) and returns its details: name, owner, metadata fields, and a content excerpt. Use this whenever the user asks about a specific ticket ID.

ticket_id.description: The ticket identifier to look up, e.g. 'DIS-1423' or 'TICKET-88'.
